home.title: PLT Vehicle Rental Kreis Kleve – Cars, Vans, Trucks & Trailers
home.description: PLT Vehicle Rental near the Lower Rhine: rent cars, trucks, vans and trailers flexibly – at 11 stations across Kreis Kleve (Weeze, Goch, Geldern, Kevelaer and more). Check availability online.

hero.title: Rent a vehicle near Weeze
hero.subtitle: Cars, trucks, vans and trailers for private and business use.

stationsPage.title: Rental stations near the Lower Rhine
stationsPage.subtitle: PLT Vehicle Rental operates with partner stations across the entire Kreis Kleve region. Vehicles can be picked up and returned close to home.
stationsPage.note: Please arrange pickup and availability in advance by phone or via the request form.

availabilityPage.title: Check availability
availabilityPage.subtitle: See at a glance which vehicles are free at your station – and book directly online.
availabilityPage.pickHint: First choose your station. You'll then see the vehicles currently available.
availabilityPage.windowNote: Availability for the coming days. For very short-notice bookings, please give us a call.
availabilityPage.callToBook: Currently booked – please enquire by phone
availabilityPage.ctaAvailable: Found the right vehicle? Book your preferred period directly online.
availabilityPage.ctaAllBooked: No vehicle is available online right now. Give us a call – we can often still find a solution at short notice: {phone}
availabilityPage.noData: No online availability data is currently available for this station. Please enquire by phone.

vehiclesPage.title: Our vehicles
vehiclesPage.subtitle: Choose the vehicle category that fits your needs – we'll find the right solution.

pricesPage.title: Prices & rates
pricesPage.subtitle: Fair and flexible rental solutions – transparent and straightforward.
pricesPage.intro: Our prices depend on the vehicle, rental period and availability. We're happy to provide a non-binding quote.
pricesPage.variableNote: The price depends on the vehicle, rental period and availability. Check availability now without obligation.

notes.title: Notes
notes.deposit: A deposit applies for certain vehicles.
notes.insurance: Insurance coverage depends on vehicle and rate.
notes.mileage: Mileage policy depends on rental period and vehicle.

aboutPage.title: About PLT Vehicle Rental
aboutPage.subtitle: Straightforward vehicle rental near the border.
aboutPage.intro: PLT Vehicle Rental stands for straightforward vehicle rental near the Lower Rhine border region.
aboutPage.body: Whether it's a private move, commercial transport or short-term vehicle needs: at PLT, customers receive personal advice and flexible rental solutions tailored to their needs.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.subtitle: We're here for you – fast and easy to reach.
contactPage.hoursNote: Rental by arrangement – individual per station. Please arrange pickup and return by phone or check availability online.

form.title: Send a request
form.name: Name
form.consent: I have read the privacy notice and agree to the processing of my data to handle my request.
form.success: Thank you! Your request has been sent. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.wipText: We're currently setting up the request form for you. In the meantime, please give us a call or book directly online.
form.error: An error occurred while sending. Please try again or call us.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.consentRequired: Please agree to the data processing.
